words.def: (astronomy) a celestial body of hot gases that radiates energy derived from thermonuclear reactions in the interior
words.zh: n. 星, 恆星, 星形物, 運氣, 明星

words.def: studies intended to provide general knowledge and intellectual skills (rather than occupational or professional skills)
the products of human creativity; works of art collectively
words.zh: n. 藝術, 人文科學, 技術, 巧妙, 詭計, 美術

words.def: the seventh and last day of the week; observed as the Sabbath by Jews and some Christians
